name: @axiom/web-engine
description: Axiom pure-TypeScript browser engine: a self-contained WebGL2 + z-buffered Canvas2D renderer, fixed-step loop, input, and WebAudio, with no wasm and no Rust-spine coupling. The reusable engine every pure-TS Axiom app draws its scene through. Held to the TS spine bar (tsgo + Oxlint branch-ban + 100% coverage + co-located tests); the browser-API boundaries are the sanctioned platform edge (test-exempt.json).

scripts.gate: npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run colocation && npm run coverage
